visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman wearing a zebra-patterned bucket hat and a white lace cardigan stands in front of a supermarket's refrigerated food section. She holds a transparent plastic container of sushi and points at it while smiling broadly at the camera. (2) The scene shifts to an indoor room where two women are seated at a white table. One continues to wear the zebra hat, while the other has long black hair. The table holds the sushi container, and they are shown using chopsticks to interact with the food. (3) Close-up shots display different types of sushi: rolls topped with orange roe, pieces with fresh orange salmon, and rolls containing green avocado and shrimp. The lighting is bright and reveals the textures of the ingredients clearly. (4) The women are shown tasting the sushi, displaying exaggerated expressions of surprise and enjoyment. They use hand gestures, such as a thumbs-up, to emphasize their positive reaction to the food's flavor.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. [Slogan]: 最新的. (2) [Variety]: 好吃到不行. [Subtitle]: 加州捲壽司. (3) [Subtitle]: 它裡面有天婦羅炸蝦. (4) [Subtitle]: 還有冷水蝦. (5) [Variety]: 特殊款的. [Slogan]: 一定要來試試看. (6) [Slogan]: 這樣那麼大盒 459元. (7) [Subtitle]: 加州壽司組合. [Slogan]: 459元有21個. (8) [Slogan]: 每一個是21.8塊. (9) [Variety]: 料真的超多. (10) [Variety]: 冷水蝦做的超級無敵好吃. (11) [Variety]: 我的天!. (12) [Slogan]: 一整個加好加滿. (13) [Variety]: 口感超級棒. [Variety]: 超級讚. (14) [Slogan]: 為了中間這一條買.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators appearing throughout the video.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman wearing a zebra-pattern bucket hat, black top, and white lace cardigan; another woman with long dark hair wearing a black outfit.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A bright Costco warehouse interior with refrigerated food aisles followed by a cozy home kitchen or living room setting with soft lighting and home decor.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat, medium-tempo electronic background music begins. A cheerful female voice speaks quickly with a high pitch, describing a food item. A soft 'pop' sound effect occurs alongside the appearance of on-screen graphics. (2) The vocal delivery remains energetic. A distinct 'ding' sound effect marks the transition into a discussion about price. The background music maintains a consistent rhythmic pulse throughout. (3) Two distinct female voices are heard, both with high emotional arousal and positive valence. Short, sharp 'whoosh' sound effects are used to bridge rapid visual cuts. The sound of plastic packaging being handled is faintly audible. (4) The music swells slightly as the speakers reach a climax of praise. The voices exhibit significant pitch variability, moving from mid-range to high-pitched exclamations. The audio concludes with a final energetic statement and a hard cut.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Discovery -> Contextual Details -> Taste Test -> Final Verdict
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: To showcase and review a new California roll sushi set from Costco, highlighting its value, ingredients, and flavor quality to viewers.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Styled as an organic user food review without explicit promotional markers.

high_inference.freeDescribe: An engaging, high-energy food vlog focusing on specific product discovery at a major retailer, utilizing typical social media editing styles.
